equipmentMods.amulet: Wenn du ein Monster tötest oder einen Elite-Boss triffst, während Blutrausch aktiv ist, besteht eine Chance von 10 %, dass du einen Stapel Leben erhältst, der deine Lebenspunkte um 1 % pro Stapel erhöht (stapelt bis zu 100)
equipmentMods.bracer: Erhalte Basis-Schaden in Höhe von 1 % deines Maximal-Lebens
equipmentMods.helmet: Killing a monster or hitting an elite/boss has a 10% to trigger a Bloodlust effect, gain 5% crit damage, 2% armor and 0.35% movement speed per stack. Stacks up to 100, lasts 15 seconds.
equipmentMods.relic: Erhalte 100 Rüstung für jeden verfügbaren Trank
equipmentMods.boots: Gain 1% maximum Health per potion slot
equipmentMods.ring1: Gain 1% maximum Health for every 50 of your highest stat.

equipmentMods.amulet: Killing a monster or hitting an elite/boss while Bloodlust is active has a 10% chance to give a stack of Life, increasing your Health by 1% per stack (stacks up to 100)
equipmentMods.bracer: Gain 1% Critical Chance for every Energy regeneration point.
equipmentMods.helmet: If you are using a melee weapon, gain 2 base damage for each stance mastery level.
equipmentMods.relic: Gain 100 Armor for each available potion
equipmentMods.boots: Gain 1 base Damage for every 75 of your highest stat
equipmentMods.ring1: Gain 500 Wisdom if no offhands are equipped.
equipmentMods.ring2: Gain 15 Physical Damage for every 150 of your highest stat.

equipmentMods.amulet: Killing a monster or hitting an elite/boss while Bloodlust is active has a 10% chance to give a stack of Life, increasing your Health by 1% per stack (stacks up to 100)
equipmentMods.belt: Burning Shield: Burning shield becomes a legendary fire shield, increasing its size by 10% and damage by 30% and grants a Blessing that gives 1% Fire Damage and 1% Armor, stacks up to 75.
equipmentMods.bracer: Gain 1% Critical Chance for every Energy regeneration point.
equipmentMods.goblet: Burning Shield: Burning shield becomes a legendary fire shield, increasing its size by 10% and damage by 30% and grants a Blessing that gives 1% Fire Damage and 1% Armor, stacks up to 75.
equipmentMods.helmet: Landing a critical strike has a chance to provide a stack of Excitement, providing 3% all Elemental Damage. At 6 stacks, become the Juggernaut - gaining +25% size, +40% movement speed, +25% critical chance and double your critical damage bonus.
equipmentMods.horn: Burning Shield: Burning shield becomes a legendary fire shield, increasing its size by 10% and damage by 30% and grants a Blessing that gives 1% Fire Damage and 1% Armor, stacks up to 75.
equipmentMods.relic: Gain 5% Damage for each available potion
equipmentMods.trinket: Burning Shield: Burning shield becomes a legendary fire shield, increasing its size by 10% and damage by 30% and grants a Blessing that gives 1% Fire Damage and 1% Armor, stacks up to 75.
equipmentMods.boots: Gain 5% movement speed per potion slot

equipmentMods.belt: Rain of Flames: Meteors now explode, gaining 85% more damage.
equipmentMods.bracer: Gain 1% Critical Chance for every Energy regeneration point.
equipmentMods.goblet: Rain of Flames: When a Meteor lands, it creates a pool of lava that continuously damages enemies. The lava remains for 0.5 seconds, dealing the same damage as Rain of Flames.
equipmentMods.helmet: Killing a monster or hitting an elite/boss has a 10% to trigger a Bloodlust effect, gain 5% crit damage, 2% armor and 0.35% movement speed per stack. Stacks up to 100, lasts 15 seconds.
equipmentMods.horn: Burning Shield: Surrounds your shields with Fire Swords, increasing the damage by 60% and radius by 33%.
equipmentMods.trinket: Burning Shield: Surrounds your shields with Fire Swords, increasing the damage by 60% and radius by 33%.

equipmentMods.amulet: Killing a monster or hitting an elite/boss while Bloodlust is active has a 10% chance to give a stack of Life, increasing your Health by 1% per stack (stacks up to 100)
equipmentMods.belt: Burning Shield: The Shield will stay an additional 2 seconds. When the shield dissipates, it triggers a Fire explosion dealing 500% base damage + 25% more damage based on the shield radius.
equipmentMods.bracer: Gain additional 2% damage bonus for each extra inventory slot
equipmentMods.goblet: Burning Shield: Surrounds your shields with Fire Swords, increasing the damage by 60% and radius by 33%.
equipmentMods.helmet: Landing a critical strike has a chance to provide a stack of Excitement, providing 3% all Elemental Damage. At 6 stacks, become the Juggernaut - gaining +25% size, +40% movement speed, +25% critical chance and double your critical damage bonus.
equipmentMods.horn: Burning Shield: The Shield will stay an additional 2 seconds. When the shield dissipates, it triggers a Fire explosion dealing 500% base damage + 25% more damage based on the shield radius.
equipmentMods.relic: Gain 100 Armor for each available potion
equipmentMods.trinket: Burning Shield: Burning shield becomes a legendary fire shield, increasing its size by 10% and damage by 30% and grants a Blessing that gives 1% Fire Damage and 1% Armor, stacks up to 75.
equipmentMods.boots: Gain 1 base Damage for every 75 of your highest stat

equipmentMods.belt: Chain Lightning: Chain lightning will link three additional times.
equipmentMods.bracer: While in Berserker Fury state, gain +70% Physical Damage Bonus.
equipmentMods.goblet: Static Charge: Static charge will now stay for an additional 0.6 seconds, damaging more enemies and dealing an addition 5% per enemy inside Static Charge range.
equipmentMods.helmet: Gain 3% Lightning damage for each Critical Chance above 100%.
equipmentMods.horn: Static Charge: Static charge will now stay for an additional 0.6 seconds, damaging more enemies and dealing an addition 5% per enemy inside Static Charge range.
equipmentMods.relic: Phasing Trance now also grants 2 base Health per stack.
equipmentMods.trinket: Static Charge: Gain charges by damaging foes. Each charge adds 1% lightning damage. At 100 charges, summon thunderbolts across the battlefield.

equipmentMods.bracer: Gain 1% Critical Chance for every Energy regeneration point.
equipmentMods.relic: Gain 100 Armor for each available potion
equipmentMods.boots: When killing an elite enemy, gain 10% chance to spawn another elite. (This mod stacks up to 4 times)

equipmentMods.belt: Carnage of Fire: Now spawns on enemies. When the fire hits the ground, spawn a flaming spike that gains a 85% damage bonus.
equipmentMods.bracer: Every 4 seconds your character pulses with Arcane Damage. Each enemy hit grants a 3% Arcane Damage blessing, stacking up to 100
equipmentMods.goblet: Toxicity: Pools last 2 seconds longer and deal 100% more damage based on pool size.
equipmentMods.horn: Toxicity: Your poisonous pool increases in size by 25%.
equipmentMods.trinket: Toxicity: Your poisonous pool increases in size by 25%.

equipmentMods.amulet: If your attacks hit within 5 meters, gain extra 50% damage.
equipmentMods.ring2: Gain 500 Wisdom if no offhands are equipped.

equipmentMods.belt: Burning Shield: Burning shield becomes a legendary fire shield, increasing its size by 10% and damage by 30% and grants a Blessing that gives 1% Fire Damage and 1% Armor, stacks up to 75.
equipmentMods.bracer: Gain base Damage equal to 1% of your maximum Health
equipmentMods.goblet: Arcane Apocalypse: Increase explosion size by 30%. When an explosion hits, 25% chance to gain 2% Arcane damage buff, stacks up to 75.
equipmentMods.horn: Arcane Apocalypse: Arcane Apocalypse gains a 50% chance to explode a second time, and a 25% to explode a third time.
equipmentMods.trinket: Arcane Apocalypse: After an explosion, spawns a black hole that damages enemies over time. The black hole deals 50% damage per tick. Each stack decreases tick time by 10%, resulting in more damage over time.

equipmentMods.amulet: Gain 1 additional potion slot for every 50 of your highest stat.
equipmentMods.belt: Starblades: Gain an additional blade that deals 75% damage.
equipmentMods.bracer: Drinking a potion will not heal you, Gain 15% Elemental damage per potion slot instead
equipmentMods.goblet: Starblades: Gain an additional blade that deals 75% damage.
equipmentMods.horn: Starblades: Gain an additional blade that deals 75% damage.
equipmentMods.relic: Gain 100 Armor for each available potion
equipmentMods.trinket: Starblades: For each extra blade, all blades deal 75% additional damage.

equipmentMods.belt: Fiery Totems: Walking over a Fiery Totem causes it to explode, setting off all other Fiery Totems. Totems that explode without dealing damage spawn an Ember Ghost that tracks enemies and deals 120% damage.
equipmentMods.goblet: Burning Shield: Surrounds your shields with Fire Swords, increasing the damage by 60% and radius by 33%.
equipmentMods.horn: Burning Shield: Surrounds your shields with Fire Swords, increasing the damage by 60% and radius by 33%.
equipmentMods.relic: When using your glyph rune charged ability, all other fellowship members' glyph abilities gain charges.
equipmentMods.trinket: Burning Shield: Surrounds your shields with Fire Swords, increasing the damage by 60% and radius by 33%.

equipmentMods.belt: Lightning Totems: Totems stay for an additional 0.6 seconds and have a 50% chance to pulse with electricity when struck by lightning, dealing 150% damage.
equipmentMods.goblet: Static Charge: Static charge will now stay for an additional 0.6 seconds, damaging more enemies and dealing an addition 5% per enemy inside Static Charge range.
equipmentMods.horn: Static Charge: Gain charges by damaging foes. Each charge adds 1% lightning damage. At 100 charges, summon thunderbolts across the battlefield.
equipmentMods.relic: While Unholy Void is active, gain 0.2% damage reduction for every 50 of your highest stat
equipmentMods.trinket: Static Charge: Static charge will now stay for an additional 0.6 seconds, damaging more enemies and dealing an addition 5% per enemy inside Static Charge range.

equipmentMods.belt: Starblades: Starblades have a 25% chance of striking twice.
equipmentMods.bracer: Gain 1% Critical Damage for every 500 Armor.
equipmentMods.goblet: Spark: The spark will split into an additional spark.
equipmentMods.helmet: Generate an Unholy Void around you that attacks enemies. Can't use attacks or abilities.
equipmentMods.horn: Spark: Each spark propagates four additional times.
equipmentMods.trinket: Spark: Each spark propagates four additional times.

equipmentMods.goblet: Arcane Apocalypse: Arcane Apocalypse gains a 50% chance to explode a second time, and a 25% to explode a third time.
equipmentMods.horn: Arcane Apocalypse: After an explosion, spawns a black hole that damages enemies over time. The black hole deals 50% damage per tick. Each stack decreases tick time by 10%, resulting in more damage over time.
equipmentMods.trinket: Arcane Apocalypse: Increase explosion size by 30%. When an explosion hits, 25% chance to gain 2% Arcane damage buff, stacks up to 75.

equipmentMods.goblet: Chain Lightning: With each link, Chain Lightning does additional 40% damage.
equipmentMods.horn: Chain Lightning: Chain lightning will link three additional times.
equipmentMods.trinket: Chain Lightning: Chain lightning will link three additional times.

equipmentMods.goblet: Fiery Totems: Fiery Totems triggered by you gain an additional 25% damage for each Fiery Totem on the battlefield.
equipmentMods.horn: Fiery Totems: Fiery Totems triggered by you gain an additional 25% damage for each Fiery Totem on the battlefield.
equipmentMods.trinket: Fiery Totems: Walking over a Fiery Totem causes it to explode, setting off all other Fiery Totems. Totems that explode without dealing damage spawn an Ember Ghost that tracks enemies and deals 120% damage.

equipmentMods.goblet: Toxicity: On spawn 25% chance to fire a toxic projectile that will spawn another toxicity pool. (This mod stacks up to 3 times)
equipmentMods.horn: Toxicity: Trigger a chain reaction, each projectile spawned receives additional 35% damage for each active pool on the battlefield.
equipmentMods.trinket: Toxicity: Pools last 2 seconds longer and deal 100% more damage based on pool size.
Vortex: When vortexes collide, they turn into a thunderstorm, that deals an additional 200%.

equipmentMods.goblet: Arcane Orb: Orbs become Chaos orbs, dealing 40% increased damage. Chaos Orbs gain 15% increased damage for every additional orb. Chaos orbs have a 10% chance to cause an Arcane burst when returning to the player.
Rain of Flames: Fire an two additional meteors.
Carnage of Fire: Now spawns on enemies. When the fire hits the ground, spawn a flaming spike that gains a 85% damage bonus.
Spinning Blade: Shoots a shuriken from each blade, dealing 25% damage. For each shuriken, the spinning blades get 15% additional damage.
